title: Tinted
description: Client-side mod that allows all vegetation to have a biome tint.
body:
### **Tinted**
Tinted is a simple mod, it changes all foliage and blocks with vegitation to match the biome color. This includes but is not limited to, flowers, crops, plants, mossy blocks, ect.

This is my _first_ mod I have ever made, most of the stuff I just assumed from my experience with Lua. This might not be the most optimized mod, but I highly doubt a mod that changes something so little will have major impact even if the code isn't the best.

**Please report any issues you find on the github!** I plan on adding mod support for all major biome and decoration mods with vegitation in them, so feel free to suggest them on the github also.
